description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wooden cabinet with a modern, minimalist design. The upper section features open shelving with two visible shelves, ideal for displaying or storing items, while the lower section is a closed compartment with horizontal slats, likely concealing a door or drawer. The cabinet stands on four short, blocky legs, elevating it slightly off the ground. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving it a warm, natural appearance. The back and sides are solid panels, with no visible openings or handles. The overall construction appears sturdy and well-crafted, suitable for use in urban interiors such as lobbies, offices, or residential spaces.
description: A tall, modern wooden cabinet with open shelves above and a closed slatted compartment below, standing on four short legs. The design is minimalist with visible wood grain and no visible handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing two open shelves and a closed slatted compartment at the bottom.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the solid wood panel and the depth of the cabinet.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, uninterrupted wood panel with no openings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, highlighting the cabinet's depth and solid construction.
